core_mechanism: a twistor-type correspondence that linearizes a nonlinear differential equation by establishing a one-to-one map between its solutions and holomorphic geometric data (rational curves with a prescribed normal bundle inside an auxiliary complex manifold), backed by a Lax representation recasting the nonlinear equation as the compatibility condition of an overdetermined linear system
brief_reason: The abstract's central results are a Lax representation of the governing equation and a proved one-to-one correspondence between its solutions and minitwistor spaces containing a rational curve of fixed normal bundle, i.e. an integrable-system construction encoding nonlinear-PDE solutions as holomorphic data in a dual complex space.
